subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the Name through which Thou didst rend asunder the veils of all contingent beings, and through which the coverings were consumed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسم الذی منه کشفت حجبات الممکنات و احترقت سبحات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
